details.test: Task 1: Save Windows admin password reset article and mark helpful
Task 2: Find Slack 4.x setup guide and post comment
Task 3: Create collection "Project Templates Basics" with up to three articles
Task 4: Troubleshooting wizard for FlowSync Desktop macOS sync errors and start chat
Task 5: Use Billing filters and verify print view on relevant article
Task 6: Favorite primary article and related platform variant, verify in favorites
Task 7: Build "Data Export Guide" collection from top three most-viewed articles
Task 8: Locate API rate limits section and copy code example
Task 9: Read two articles and submit medium-urgency support request from second
